src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Add the @EnableScheduling annotation to activate Spring's scheduled task execution support.
Replace hardcoded FFmpeg binary path with a value injected from application properties.
Register ServerEndpointExporter bean to enable standard JSR-356 WebSocket endpoints.
Define MultipartConfigElement bean to configure file upload location to system temp directory.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for VideoService and IVideoRepository to adhere to modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added @Autowired constructor and final fields for VideoService and IVideoRepository.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Delegate file listing and filtering logic to VideoService to simplify the controller.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Replaced inline file listing and filtering code with videoService.getFileEntities(location).

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Add logic to build and pass link entities to the model when a location is provided.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added model.addAttribute("links", Link.build(location)) inside the index method.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Implement a new endpoint to delete files and their associated transcoding directories.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added @PostMapping("/del") method that deletes the file and its write directory.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Implement a new endpoint specifically to delete transcoding directories.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added @PostMapping("/delTranscoding") method that deletes the write directory.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Remove the hardcoded video suffix array and the isVideoFile helper method as logic is now delegated.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Removed VIDEO_SUFFIX constant and isVideoFile method.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace direct usage of VideoCache with a new VideoService to handle file retrieval logic.
Replace VideoTransformQueue with VideoTransformHandler for managing video transformation tasks.
Remove deprecated SseEmitter usage in favor of a standard Model-based view for queue status.
Add support for displaying file links and entity lists in the video view model.
Remove unused imports related to the old implementation (FileCopyUtils, SseEmitter, etc.).
Add a boolean field to track if a file can be played online.
Add getter method for the new canPlay field.
Add setter method for the new canPlay field.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: public void setCanPlay(boolean canPlay) { this.canPlay = canPlay; }

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Move the local process execution logic to a shared utility class to reduce code duplication.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Removed local `process` method and added `import static top.itning.yunshu.yunshunas.util.CommandUtils.process;`

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Clean up imports that are no longer used after extracting the process utility.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Removed `import java.io.*;` (replaced with specific imports) and `import java.util.function.Consumer;`

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Extract magic number for segment time into a named constant for better maintainability.
Enhance the Progress interface to support lifecycle events (start, finish, error) and raw logging, moving away from a single functional method.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Removed `@FunctionalInterface` and added default methods `onStart`, `onLine`, `onFinish`, `onError`, and updated `onProgress` signature.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Rename the internal copy method to better reflect its purpose of standardizing video format.
Add detailed debug logging to track the progress of video conversion steps.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Added `logger.debug` calls at start/end of `videoStandardization`, `checkComplianceWithSpecificationsForHls`, and `getVideoFrames`.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Wire up the new Progress interface methods to notify callers of conversion status changes.
Wrap the video conversion logic in a try-catch block to handle errors gracefully and notify the progress listener.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Wrapped `videoConvert` body in `try { ... } catch (Exception e) { ... }` and removed `throws IOException` from signature.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Update the internal progress parsing to use the new callback signature and handle non-progress lines.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Changed `progress.progress(...)` to `progress.onProgress(...)` and added `else if` branch for `onProgress(-1, ...)`.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Mark method parameters as final to adhere to stricter coding standards or prepare for lambda usage.
Inject NasProperties via constructor to replace hardcoded file paths with configurable values.
Remove the static hardcoded output path constant to decouple configuration from code.
Reduce the Guava cache initial and maximum size from 1000 to 100.
Change fields to private final to enforce immutability and encapsulation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM to version 2.3.1.RELEASE to align with Java 11 support and modern Spring features.
Update the Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 11.
Add Undertow as the embedded web server, replacing the default Tomcat.
Explicitly exclude the default Tomcat starter from the web starter to prevent conflicts with Undertow.
Add the Spring Boot WebSocket starter to enable WebSocket support.
Add the Java-WebSocket library for low-level WebSocket handling.
Add Google Gson library for JSON processing.
Add the TypeBuilder library for dynamic type generation.
Add Spring Boot configuration processor for metadata generation.
Move hardcoded dependency versions to properties for better management.
Add the Aliyun Nexus mirror to speed up dependency downloads in China.
Update project version, description, URL, and license information.

src/main/resources/templates/common.html.general_idea: Add a navigation link to the home page in the sidebar menu.
Add a navigation link to the video queue page in the sidebar menu.
Add a navigation link to the download queue page in the sidebar menu.
Add a navigation link to the real-time log page in the sidebar menu.

src/main/resources/templates/index.html.general_idea: Differentiate file icons to show a video camera icon for playable files instead of a generic file icon.
Enable navigation to a video player endpoint when a playable file is clicked.
Display a list of navigation links (breadcrumbs) at the top of the file list.
Add CSS styles to format the appearance of the navigation links.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Migrate the real-time progress update mechanism from Server-Sent Events (EventSource) to WebSocket for bidirectional communication.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl: Replaced `new EventSource("progress")` with `new WebSocket("ws://" + window.location.host + "/p")` and updated message handling logic.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Introduce a fixed control bar with an auto-scroll toggle and a manual refresh button to improve user experience.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl: Added `.fix_control` div containing a switch for `autoScroll` and a button calling `refresh()`.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Refactor the message rendering to append individual paragraphs and handle line breaks, replacing the simple innerHTML concatenation.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl:
Implemented `setMessageInnerHTML` to split input by newlines and append `

` tags to `#message`.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Implement standard WebSocket event listeners for open, close, error, and window unload events.

src/main/resources/templates/video.html.general_idea: Include the video.js hotkeys plugin script to enable keyboard shortcuts for playback control.
Update the page title to dynamically include the current video filename using Thymeleaf.
Add a breadcrumb navigation component to display the file path hierarchy.
Change the video element tag from standard HTML5 video to video-js specific tag for better plugin integration.
Add UI buttons for deleting transcoding files, deleting videos, and copying video paths.
Add a switch to toggle MSE (Media Source Extensions) resource usage to fix playback speed issues in some browsers.
Add a table to display a list of files and directories with icons and navigation capabilities.
Initialize video.js with playback rates, hotkeys configuration, and MSE override settings based on user preference.
Implement JavaScript functions to handle AJAX requests for deleting videos and transcoding files.
Implement JavaScript logic to handle navigation between directories and video playback pages.
Implement JavaScript function to copy the current video stream URL to the clipboard.
